title: S.W.O.R.D (Strong Weapons Of Rapid Destruction)
description: Swords that slice and smash enemies that are in your way! new biomes, structures and QOL mods for the best experience. look at description!
body:
# What is the S.W.O.R.D MODPACK
  Super cool, practically endless choices of weapons, like swords, katanas and crossbows that shoot almost any item! (with the OMNI enchant), there can also be gold, copper, diamond and even netherite crossbows. and as well you can gather artifacts to make weapons with the power of a god! pretty much anything you can imagine, its pretty universal when it comes to PVP and survival. and maybe this modpack is for you! also caves with the shaders and the mods look very cool too, there are also more biomes and structures with mobs protecting them! with the mod swords being able to be crafted!! There's not Only that but As well Voice chat so you could speak with whoever your trying to talk with!   

### SUP Mods 
  Supporting Mods is also embedded in this modpack, like sodium, ferrite core, essential, ETC

## Tips if your instance crashed
  if any CCCs (concern, comments and complaints) here is the discord server: https://discord.gg/WzRGgvMeRx, just in case, if you ever Do experience any difficulties with loading up the modpack, its either that, Number 1, downloaded some sort of custom mod that you wanted to add to the instance, you can do that, but at its limits, like some gun mods that ive tried to use actually stall the opening of the instance (due to LIB comprehension issues) but just try to avoid mods that have LIB models (with other LIB mods in specific). or that number 2, you probably updated something the a newer version which actually just crashes your instance. but dont worry, if this ever happens when you already gathered some progress by playing your world, you wont lose your progress when Your instance crashes, you will be fine, (but if you delete a mod thats not an optimizer then you May or may not be ok, but most of the time if you redownload it, you will be probably fine)

### YT vid tutorial 
  Also if wondering about anything with the swords (personally, it helped myself) here is a vid: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/GdsbxgwahfA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

  here is one of the swords!  THE KATANA, this is only one of the many of swords the modpack has to bring![katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d196ab80fbc4a31c868e06e4ce7b96e79749d46.png)

  - Remember to never underestimate modpacks or mods that don't have much downloads (just because they do, Doesn't mean they are always are faulty or unliked) they might be secretly be something that would be perfect for you! (maybe like mine!)
